MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Represented by Jason Bandera
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Carolyn Winter, is present.
Attorney, Annabel Chang , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-18-2011 is vacated.
